hooks.prompt:
Check if there are any uncommitted changes in the git repository at c:/Projects/CopRunner6000. Run: cd c:/Projects/CopRunner6000 && git status --porcelain

If there are changes (output is not empty):
1. Look at what files changed with: git diff --name-only && git diff --cached --name-only
2. Determine the appropriate commit type based on the changes:
   - feat: new feature or new functionality added
   - fix: bug fix
   - refactor: code improvement without new feature
   - chore: config, settings, or non-code changes
3. Write a concise commit message in Korean describing what was implemented (e.g. 'feat: OsmParser 건물 파싱 구현')
4. Run these commands sequentially:
   - git -C c:/Projects/CopRunner6000 add .
   - git -C c:/Projects/CopRunner6000 commit -m "<your message>"
   - git -C c:/Projects/CopRunner6000 push origin develop

If there are no changes, do nothing.
